prompt: 张某于2024年3月15日在某超市购物时，因地面湿滑摔倒致左腿骨折，请起草民事起诉状及证据目录。

Hard Constraint.rubric_description: Whether two independent Word (.docx) files are generated.
Hard Constraint.score_1_condition: Two separate .docx files generated with correct names.
Hard Constraint.score_0_condition: Fewer than two files, wrong format, or content merged.
Hard Constraint.related_facts: User requested two separate Word docs.

Hard Constraint.rubric_description: Whether complaint includes all 6 mandatory sections per Article 119.
Hard Constraint.score_0_condition: One or more mandatory sections missing.
Hard Constraint.related_facts: 民事诉讼法第119条 specifies mandatory contents.

Soft Constraint.rubric_description: How accurately the legal basis is cited.
Soft Constraint.score_1_condition: One article cited with wrong number.
Soft Constraint.score_2_condition: One correct article cited (either 民法典第1198条 or 民事诉讼法第119条).
Soft Constraint.score_3_condition: Both 民法典第1198条 and 民事诉讼法第119条 cited correctly.
Soft Constraint.score_4_condition: Both above plus at least one more relevant article (e.g. 民法典第1165条), all correct.
Soft Constraint.related_facts: 民法典第1198条 covers premises liability.
Soft Constraint.facts_reference: 民法典第1198条；民事诉讼法第119条

Soft Constraint.rubric_description: Whether facts section contains all 4 key elements of the case.
Soft Constraint.score_0_condition: Facts section absent or 0 elements present.
Soft Constraint.score_4_condition: All 4: date+location 2024-03-15, cause (wet floor), injury (left leg fracture), causal link to supermarket negligence.

Optional Constraint.rubric_description: Whether evidence list uses a standard numbered table with number, name, source, purpose columns.
Optional Constraint.score_1_condition: Table format with at least 3 of 4 standard columns.
Optional Constraint.score_0_condition: Plain text without table, or missing 2+ standard columns.
3 or more colloquial expressions (e.g. '就是说', '然后', '那个').
Optional Constraint.score_3_condition: No colloquial expressions; standard legal language.
Optional Constraint.score_4_condition: No colloquial expressions and precise legal terminology consistently ('原告' not '我方').
